Video.summary: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he’s just trying to return the vehicle to a friend. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.
Video.title: Invisible Intruders

Video.summary: A suspect tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.
Video.title: Bumming a Smoke

Video.summary: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn. A father threatens his daughter and her boyfriend with a knife.
Video.title: Family Therapy

Video.summary: A man needs police assistance when his angry ex-girlfriend crawls through his window. Police must play hide-and-seek when they attempt to execute an arrest warrant. A man is threatened with violence when he refuses to turn his car’s headlights off.
Video.title: Don't Make her Angry

Video.summary: A man is tasered twice after struggling with two deputies. A gas station fight ends in a foot chase. A deputy pulls over a pair of quarreling lovers after they run a stop sign.
Video.title: Gas up and Run!

Video.summary: A man tosses his stash after being pulled over. Officers question two men in a fight who live with the same woman. A man says his shorts are from a thrift store after drugs are found in them.
Video.title: Hot Potato

Video.summary: Deputies pursue a truck with a trailer full of golf carts. Police question a driver after finding a mask and handgun in his car. Officers are called to a traffic collision involving a semi and an SUV.
Video.title: High Speed Golf

Video.summary: Police follow a car after it leaves a drug house. A police officer in Las Vegas goes undercover posing as a ‘john.’ Officers give chase when they observe a car making an illegal U-Turn.
Video.title: Read the Signs

Video.summary: In New Orleans, police respond to a shots fired call. A suspect peddles a bike on the wrong side of the road with his girlfriend on the handlebars. A woman reports her husband to the police when he throws her down the stairs.
Video.title: Shots in the Big Easy

Video.summary: A jaywalker with no ID bolts away from an officer. A man mixes illicit items with his pizza. A woman involved in a domestic violence call blames her monthly issues.
Video.title: Dangerous Toppings

Video.summary: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people while scanning train tracks. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.
Video.title: Checked Luggage

Video.summary: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.
Video.title: Hide and Seek

Video.summary: Two suspects lead Officers on a high speed pursuit. An Officer discovers two men have warrants after a traffic stop. A man hides from the police after a domesitc disturbance call.
Video.title: On the Run

Video.summary: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.
Video.title: Give Me My Money

Video.summary: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An elderly woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles on the side of the road.
Video.title: One for the Road

Video.summary: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.
Video.title: Nudged Out

Video.summary: Officers discover a grand theft auto suspect hiding in his apartment. Officers assist the fire department in capturing a brown bear from a palm tree. Officers respond to a shooting.
Video.title: Bear the Cost

Video.summary: Officers are called when a disturbed naked man covered in blood is spotted in a park. Officers find a nude couple in a U-Haul truck. A traffic stop over a minor violation turns into a dangerous pursuit.
Video.title: Naked Rental

Video.summary: Suspects lead Officers on a reckless car chase on residential streets. Police tend to a woman assaulted by her inebriated friend. A DWI suspect is found relieving himself in a public port-a-potty.
Video.title: Reckless Runners

Video.summary: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An Officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.
Video.title: Slow Mo’ Drag Racer

Video.summary: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by Police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.
Video.title: Naked Chase

Video.summary: Officers respond to a traffic accident after a man runs his truck through a wall. An undercover officer poses as a “john” and later a vehicle is stopped due to a missing license plate.
Video.title: Stonewalled

Video.summary: Officers conduct a traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. Officers conduct a drug-reversal-buy sting to capture buyers.
Video.title: Crazy as a Loon

Video.summary: At the conclusion of an extensive pursuit, the driver eventually loses control and runs into a stop sign. Officers stop a stolen vehicle leaving a known drug house.
Video.title: Bottom Fishing

Video.summary: Officers investigate an apparent stabbing. Officers respond to a call about a suspicious man loitering in a private park. A driver insists his vehicle is not stolen even though the plates are.
Video.title: Loiter with intent

Video.summary: Officers respond to an assault call at a local residence. A juvenile with a firearm is detained. Officers respond to a report of a man firing a gun in front of his residence.
Video.title: Copy of Warning shot

Video.summary: A man tries to bite an officer after narcotics are spotted in his mouth. Officers respond to a family fighting in their front yard. A suspect claims to be repaying a debt when he's caught buying drugs.
Video.title: I Always Pay My Debts

Video.summary: Officers get more than they expected when they stop a cyclist and discover a deadly weapon. Four sons attempt to break into the family home after being banned. A homeowner claims he accidently fired five shots while cleaning a gun.
Video.title: Five Shots and Four Sons

Video.summary: A routine traffic stop turns into a drug bust when cops turn up evidence of the driver's sizable habit. A suspicious man waiting in a parked car can't explain the incriminating texts on his phone. Two frequent flyers give officers a hard time when pulled over in a well-known drug area.
Video.title: Not My Text Messages

Video.summary: Officers deploy a police K-9 when a burglary suspect takes refuge in a lemon tree. A suspect on the run seeks shelter in a stranger’s house. A biker with a suspended license just doesn’t know how to listen.
Video.title: Who Let the Dogs Out

Video.summary: A suspect flees as officers respond to a fight call. A belligerent meth user refuses to cooperate after being pulled over. A cranky husband gets busted for pot after his wife kicks over his Harley.
Video.title: Fight and Flight

Video.summary: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.
Video.title: Fast Food Escape

Video.summary: Cops try desperately to get an unclothed man to cooperate. After a chase with a pickup truck, officers find a 14-year-old in the driver’s seat. On a routine traffic stop, police contend with a plethora of dope and even more lies.
Video.title: Put Your Clothes Back On

Video.summary: Cops are forced to take desperate measures when an unruly suspect won’t stop fighting. Officers have to contain a man looking to flee with crack. Police know a tearful driver has weed in the car when he refuses to open his glove box.
Video.title: Tazed and Confused

Video.summary: Cops attempt to piece together whether or not an erratic driver is in a stolen vehicle. A knife-wielding man complains that rude neighbors won’t stop smoking pot. Officers come upon an emotional man with a blade to his throat.
Video.title: Step Away From the Cutlery

Video.summary: The new chief in town oversees a series of undercover drug buys. Officers arrest a drunken man who can’t stop talking. A domestic abuse suspect admits to laying the smack down on her mooching husband.
Video.title: I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back

Image.alt: I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back

Video.summary: A suspect uses bizarre driving techniques to elude cops. A tough officer wades through a forest of denial before finding the crack. Police search for man accused of shooting up the neighborhood.
Video.title: Pass the Rock

Video.summary: A dangerous high speed motorcycle chase ends in a wreck and a subsequent arrest. A Florida woman is pulled over in a routine traffic stop and is rewarded for her cooperation. A sheriff creates harmony between a quarreling couple at a mobile park.
Video.title: Abandonment of a Trailer

Video.summary: Officers engage in a vehicular pursuit involving a narcotics suspect. Officers respond to a domestic violence call involving a mother, daughter and the mother’s new husband to be. An officer makes an arrest in a stolen SUV case.
Video.title: Double Whammy

Video.summary: Officers give chase to a suspect on a bike. The passenger of a vehicle is arrested for possession. Police are given a classic "I'm holding it for a friend" excuse.
Video.title: Dog Eat Dog

Video.summary: An officer subdues a young man in mental duress. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle and find drug paraphernalia inside the woman's car. Officers respond to a robbery in progress.
Video.title: Ransacked

Video.summary: Officers make an arrest in connection to an armed robbery with the help of the K-9 unit. Officers respond to a disturbance call at a local restaurant involving the manager and an inebriated patron. An officer pulls over a vehicle which later turns out to be littered with drug paraphernalia.
Video.title: Pay the Price

Video.summary: A high speed chase comes to a halt in a residential area and the driver is taken in for sobriety testing. A suspicious vehicle takes off as an officer approaches and a high speed chase ensues. An officer pulls over a vehicle belonging to a battery suspect who attempts to eat evidence.
Video.title: No Wanna Stop

Video.summary: A suspect bails out of his vehicle when a car chase reaches a dead-end. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call and recommends that the quarreling couple get a divorce. Officers investigate a suspected drug transaction.
Video.title: Tit for Tat

Video.summary: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation. An elderly man is questioned after reportedly kicking a juvenile in the face. A man is shot in the head by his roommate.
Video.title: Down-home Dog

Video.summary: Officers find drugs after pursuing a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car. Officers intervene in a domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.
Video.title: School Zone Chase

Video.summary: Police investigate an attempted robbery that turned deadly. Officers enlist a K9 unit to flush out a suspect. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.
Video.title: The Last Home Invasion

Video.summary: A reckless driver tries to avoid a checkpoint but outmaneuvers himself instead. Fingers are pointed fast when cops interview a peculiar group of people. Deputies dig to get to the bottom of things.
Video.title: Pants Party

Video.summary: A teen makes a run for it after being turned over to medics. During a traffic stop, a suspect does his best to keep his lips sealed. An angry aunt can’t evict her nephew and his pregnant girlfriend.
Video.title: That’s My Grill

Video.summary: A suspected car thief ditches his ride when police spot him. Officers are called to a bar when an enraged man pulls out a knife. An argument over a bit of milk takes a violent turn.
Video.title: Crying Over Spilled Milk

Video.summary: Deputies are shocked when they recognize a repeat offender. When confronted by the cops, a desperate man shows no love for his girlfriend. Officers bring in a canine unit to complete a vehicle search.
Video.title: Second Time Around

Video.summary: A suspect plays it cool when officers try to match a gun to his holster. Poor choices in a parking lot inspire a life coaching moment. Cops respond to a call and learn that good neighbors do exist.
Video.title: Love Gone Bad

Video.summary: A homeless man decides to test the police when he thinks there’s no escape. Good Samaritans catch a man breaking into their neighbor’s car. Officers try to resolve a dispute between newlyweds.
Video.title: Trouble in Paradise

Video.summary: A woman bursts into tears when pulled over by police. During a sketchy traffic stop, one nervous passenger is quick to help deputies. A suspect blames the contents of his wallet on a stranger.
Video.title: The Blame Game

Video.summary: A defiant motorist can’t believe it when his mother sides with the law. Deputies discover a man in a strange costume during a traffic stop. Officers protect a hardworking mom from sudden visitors.
Video.title: Mother Knows Best

Video.summary: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired. A father and daughter are found in fear of a man wielding a screwdriver. The police catch a bunch of pretty women making poor choices.
Video.title: The Truth is Key

Video.summary: A desperate trespasser attempts to give the cops the slip. A frightened man tries to get the attention of deputies and takes the wrong approach. Officers show that a little honesty can go a long way.
Video.title: British Invasion
